zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Babington於1462年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿福時，她的父親Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston39歲，母親Lady Isabel De Bradbourne35歲。她於大約1477年與John Rossel在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年9月15日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉德克利夫 奧 特倫特享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Babington于1462年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿福时，她的父亲Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston39岁，母亲Lady Isabel De Bradbourne35岁。她于大约1477年与John Rossel在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿福结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1507年9月15日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉德克利夫 奧 特倫特享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Babington was born in 1462, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, was 39 and her mother, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, was 35. She married John Rossel about 1477, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 15 September 1507, in Radcliffe on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

Elle a épousé John Rossel environ 1477, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1507, à Radcliffe on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Babingtonが1462年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで生まれた時，父Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingstonは39歳，母Lady Isabel De Bradbourneは35歳であった。約1477年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーでJohn Rosselと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1507年9月15日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラドクリフ オン トレントで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Babington(이)가 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쇼버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel De Bradbourne(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쇼버에서 John Rossel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 9월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라드c리프  트렌트에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Babington родилась в 1462 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Rossel около 1477 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 сентября 1507 г. в местности радклифф он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
